title: My account
subtitle: Manage your personal access to this instance.
hint: If you do not remember your current password, use “Forgot my password” from the login screen.

errors.min_length: The new password must be at least 8 characters long.
errors.password_mismatch: The new passwords do not match.
errors.session_invalid: Your session expired. Log in again.
errors.user_not_found: Your user could not be found.
errors.local_password_not_set: Your account does not have a local password configured. Use password recovery or corporate access.
errors.same_password: The new password must be different from the current one.
